data.headline: Scalable Profit Engineering
data.subtitle: I've managed $8,000,000+ in ad budgets to move e-commerce stores from stagnation to profitable scale. We don't buy clicks — we build systems that attract high-LTV customers.

data.title: Live KPI Dashboard
data.subtitle: Upload your campaign CSV to run an instant health check
data.privacyNotice: Data is processed locally in your browser and not uploaded. Your campaign data never leaves your device.

data.title: Turning Ad Spend Into Sustainable Growth
content: With over 8 years of experience in digital marketing and media buying, I've developed a systematic approach to campaign optimization that prioritizes sustainable growth over short-term gains. My methodology combines rigorous data analysis with deep understanding of consumer psychology and platform algorithms.

I specialize in helping e-commerce brands scale profitably, having managed over $8 million in ad spend across Meta, Google, TikTok, and emerging platforms. My clients typically see a 40-60% improvement in ROAS within the first 90 days of working together.

Beyond campaign management, I'm passionate about building systems and tools that democratize access to professional-grade marketing analytics. This portfolio showcases both my client work and the custom tools I've developed to make data-driven marketing more accessible.

data.subtitle: A comprehensive toolkit built through years of hands-on campaign management

skills.title: Media Buying
skills.description: Strategic campaign planning, audience targeting, bid optimization, and budget allocation across all major platforms.

skills.title: Analytics & Reporting
skills.description: Deep-dive analysis of campaign performance, attribution modeling, and actionable insights generation.

skills.title: Conversion Optimization
skills.description: Landing page optimization, A/B testing frameworks, funnel analysis, and conversion rate improvement.

skills.title: Technical Setup
skills.description: Pixel implementation, server-side tracking, data layer configuration, and technical troubleshooting.

skills.title: Creative Strategy
skills.description: Creative testing frameworks, ad copy optimization, visual storytelling, and creative performance analysis.

skills.title: Audience Development
skills.description: Lookalike modeling, audience segmentation, retargeting strategies, and customer journey mapping.

data.subtitle: Real results from real campaigns — each case study showcases systematic approaches to scaling

blocks.title: Fashion Brand Scale: 0 to $500K/month
blocks.description: Scaled a sustainable fashion brand from $50K to $500K monthly revenue in 8 months while maintaining 4.2x ROAS.

caseStudy.overview: This project involved scaling a sustainable fashion brand from $50K to $500K in monthly revenue while maintaining profitability.
strategy: Implemented creative testing framework with 3 new ads per week
Built custom audience segments based on LTV data
Developed lookalike audiences from best customers
Restructured campaign architecture for scaling efficiency
caseStudy.testimonial: Their systematic approach to scaling transformed our business. We finally have predictable, profitable growth.

blocks.title: Beauty Brand Profitability Turnaround
blocks.description: Transformed an unprofitable beauty subscription from 0.8x to 3.5x ROAS through creative testing and audience restructuring.

caseStudy.overview: A beauty subscription brand was losing money on paid acquisition with 0.8x ROAS.
strategy: Audited existing campaigns to identify waste
caseStudy.testimonial: We went from burning cash to profitable growth in just 3 months.

blocks.title: Global Expansion: 3 Markets Launch
blocks.description: Launched a wellness brand in UK, Canada, and Australia, achieving positive ROAS within 30 days in each market.

caseStudy.overview: Successfully launched a wellness brand in UK, Canada, and Australia simultaneously.
caseStudy.testimonial: Expanding internationally seemed daunting, but their expertise made it feel seamless.

blocks.title: B2B SaaS Lead Generation
blocks.description: Built a LinkedIn + Google lead gen engine for a B2B SaaS, reducing CAC by 65% while doubling MQL volume.

caseStudy.overview: Built a comprehensive lead generation engine for a B2B SaaS company.
caseStudy.testimonial: Our sales team now has more qualified leads than they can handle.

blocks.title: Custom Analytics Dashboard
blocks.description: Built a custom attribution dashboard integrating 5 data sources, providing unified view of marketing performance.

caseStudy.overview: Built a custom attribution dashboard integrating data from Meta, Google, TikTok, and Shopify.
caseStudy.testimonial: Finally, we have a single source of truth for all our marketing data.

data.statement: I'm committed to building systems that transform paid media from a cost center into a predictable growth engine. My goal is to help e-commerce brands achieve sustainable profitability through data-driven optimization, transparent practices, and continuous innovation in marketing technology.

data.title: Let's Discuss Your Goals
data.description: Whether you're looking to scale your ad spend profitably, need an account audit, or want to explore working together, I'd love to hear from you.

data.tagline: Building profitable growth systems for e-commerce brands.
